source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the diagram, $\triangle ABC$ is right-angled at $C$. Also, points $M$, $N$ and $P$ are the midpoints of sides $BC$, $AC$ and $AB$, respectively.  If the area of $\triangle APN$ is $2\mbox{ cm}^2$, then what is the area, in square centimeters, of $\triangle ABC$? <image1>
